texto: The so-called sensitivity of neurotics develops along with their egotism
autor: they cannot bear for other people to flaunt the sufferings with which they are increasingly preoccupied themselves.
explicacao: Orientação direta de they cannot bear for other people to flaunt the sufferings with which they are increasingly preoccupied themselves. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The so-called sensitivity of neurotics develops along with their egotism” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, marcel-proust, the-guermantes-way, útil em momentos de the-guermantes-way.
